ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job opening */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Level of the job (e.g., I-1, I-2) */,
  "job_network" TEXT /* Network associated with the job (if applicable) */,
  "job_family" TEXT /* Category of the job (e.g., Internship) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or office offering the job */,
  "duty_station" TEXT /* Location where the job is stationed */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the job */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "education_requirements" TEXT /* Educational qualifications required for the job */,
  "experience_requirements" TEXT /* Experience required for the job */,
  "language_requirements" TEXT /* Language proficiency required for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered with the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job posting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the job posting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL for the department's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the job family (e.g., Internship, Full-Time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job family */,
  "is_internship" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the job family is for internships */,
  "minimum_duration" INTEGER /* Minimum duration of the job in months */,
  "maximum_duration" INTEGER /* Maximum duration of the job in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the job level (e.g., I-1, I-2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job level */,
  "minimum_experience" INTEGER /* Minimum experience required for the job level */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job for which the application is submitted */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "applicant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of application submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Submitted, Reviewed) */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Path to the applicant's resume */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Path to the applicant's cover letter */,
  "references" TEXT /* Path to the applicant's references */,
  "application_source" TEXT /* Source from which the application was received (e.g., job board, referral) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Recruiter, Applicant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview session */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application linked to the interview */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "interviewer" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the interview (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  "interview_location" TEXT /* Location where the interview will take place */,
  "interview_format" TEXT /* Format of the interview (e.g., In-person, Video call) */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the interview */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interview was scheduled */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interview details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application linked to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read by the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deadlines" (
  "deadline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deadline record */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job linked to this deadline */,
  "deadline_date" TEXT /* Deadline date for the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the deadline was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the deadline was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deadline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deadlines_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the job network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the network was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)
